title: bupleurum longicaule var. giraldii
intro: Bupleurum longicaule var. giraldii, also known as Giraldo's Hare's ear, is a variety of the Bupleurum longicaule plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum longicaule var. giraldii include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of the common cold, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that may help to protect against chronic diseases. Bupleurum longicaule var. giraldii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
